name: [GRIDHAND] Internal Ops Agent - Weekly team report → compile from all tools → send to owner

gridhand.scenario: Weekly team report → compile from all tools → send to owner
gridhand.description: Every Sunday evening at 6 PM, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered to compile a weekly team report, aggregating key performance data from apps like Square for sales, Google Calendar for schedules, and FreshBooks for invoicing, which are then organized into a concise summary. This summary is sent via email to the business owner, providing a clear overview of the past week's activity, including total revenue, appointment volume, and outstanding payments, allowing them to make informed decisions for the upcoming week. By automating this weekly report, the business owner saves several hours of manual data collection and analysis, enabling them to focus on strategic growth and improvement.
